phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest fitting room is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les cabines d'essayage, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay kah-BEEN day-say-YAHZH seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Rue Sainte-Catherine is one of the longest pedestrian shopping streets in Europe at nearly 1.2 km.

responses.english: At the back of the store, on the left.
responses.phonetic: oh FOHN doo mah-gah-ZEHN, ah GOHSH
responses.french: Au fond du magasin, à gauche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if an item is available in a different size
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que vous avez cet article dans une autre taille ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh voo-ZAH-vay set ar-TEEKL dahn-ZOON oh-truh TAH-yuh
phrases.cultural_note: French clothing sizes differ from US and UK sizes; ask for a size chart if needed.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they do gift wrapping
phrases.cultural_note: Many French shops offer complimentary gift wrapping, especially during holiday periods.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they accept credit cards
phrases.cultural_note: Most shops on Rue Sainte-Catherine accept cards, but some smaller traders may have a minimum spend.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the shops close
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ferment les magasins ce soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel ur FAIR-mahn lay mah-gah-ZAN suh SWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: Most shops close around 7 or 8 pm; on Sundays many remain closed or keep reduced hours.
